introSection: Honigkiste (English: Honeybox) is a kiddie roller coaster currently located at Jaderpark in Jaderberg, Lower Saxony, Germany. It used to be named Seifenkiste untill 2024.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The car was designed to resemble a soapbox race car.

fullText:
Honigkiste (English: Honeybox) is a kiddie roller coaster currently located at Jaderpark in Jaderberg, Lower Saxony, Germany. It used to be named Seifenkiste untill 2024.



Red track and yellow supports.

The car was designed to resemble a soapbox race car.
